text:
</SMS>
While calling the above API, the XML tags should be in continuation.
Parameters:
action: send
data: XML tags for sending messages.
Sample API Call made by Client’s Application
http:// 172.16.2.99/ConnectOneUrl/SendXml/SendSmsXml?data=
<MESSAGE VER="1.2"> <USER USERNAME="admin" PASSWORD="admin" DLR="0"/>
<SMS TEXT="This is first sms" ID="1">
<ADDRESS FROM="UNICEL" TO="919945014014" SEQ="1"/>
<ADDRESS FROM="UNICEL" TO="919945016016" SEQ="2"/>
</SMS>
<SMS TEXT="This is second sms" ID="2">
<ADDRESS FROM="UNICEL" TO="919945014014" SEQ="1"/>
<ADDRESS FROM="UNICEL" TO="919741034219" SEQ="2"/>
</SMS>
</MESSAGE>

<RESPONSE ID="1" SEQ="2" MSGID="1644289" STATUS="SUCCESS" />
<RESPONSE ID="2" SEQ="1" MSGID="1644290" STATUS="SUCCESS" />
